meta.summary: MACS3 3.0.4 runtime for ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq, DNA enrichment peak calling, bedGraph operations, and HMMRATAC.
meta.description: MACS3 3.0.4 runtime for ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq, DNA enrichment peak calling, bedGraph operations, and HMMRATAC.

test: set -eu; macs3 --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.0.4' >/dev/null && macs3 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'callpeak' >/dev/null && macs3 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'hmmratac' >/dev/null && macs3 callpeak --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'callpeak' >/dev/null && macs3 bdgpeakcall --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'bdgpeakcall' >/dev/null && macs3 hmmratac --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'hmmratac' >/dev/null

set -eu; python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import MACS3, numpy, scipy, sklearn, hmmlearn, cykhash; assert md.version("MACS3") == "3.0.4"; print("macs3-runtime-ok", md.version("numpy"), md.version("scipy"), md.version("scikit-learn"), md.version("hmmlearn"), md.version("cykhash"))' | grep -F 'macs3-runtime-ok' >/dev/null && grep -F 'source_sha256=1c2c9cc219d136b026b5e517dcbc518c3f76b9c864b8b52f00c7902f11070aef' /opt/macs3/share/doc/macs3/source.txt >/dev/null && find /opt/macs3/venv -type f -name '*.so' -print0 | xargs -0 -r ldd > /tmp/taf-macs3-ldd.txt && ! grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-macs3-ldd.txt >/dev/null

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-macs3-callpeak-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/macs3/share/testdata/macs3_smoke.py "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; macs3 callpeak -t reads.bed -f BED -g 1000 -n smoke --outdir callpeak --nomodel --extsize 50 --shift 0 --keep-dup all -B --nolambda -p 0.99 > callpeak.log 2>&1; test -s callpeak/smoke_peaks.xls; test -s callpeak/smoke_treat_pileup.bdg; grep -F 'chr1' callpeak/smoke_treat_pileup.bdg >/dev/null; grep -F 'Done!' callpeak.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-macs3-bdgpeakcall-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/macs3/share/testdata/macs3_smoke.py "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; macs3 bdgpeakcall -i signal.bdg -c 5 -l 20 -g 10 -o peaks.bed > bdgpeakcall.log 2>&1; test -s peaks.bed; grep -F 'chr1' peaks.bed >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: MACS3
upstream.citation: Zhang et al. 2008, Model-based Analysis of ChIP-Seq (MACS)
